name: Hungarian Dumplings (Galuska)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together dry ingredients.
2. Combine the egg, milk and melted butter; gradually add to the flour, stirring until the dough is smooth and no longer sticks to the spoon.
3. Break off pieces of dough about 1 inch long and 1/2 inch thick.
4. Drop the pieces into rapidly boiling water.
5. Boil covered for 12 to 15 minutes.
